message:
feat: end-to-end DO benchmarks via wrangler dev

- Add Parquet JS decode path using decodeParquetColumnChunk (fixes WASM
  OOM on string columns caused by interpreting Thrift page headers as
  length-prefixed strings)
- Add Lance whole-file execution path for v2 format (pages[] empty in
  v2 protobuf metadata)
- Fix fragmentLoad return code check (returns 1 on success, not 0)
- Normalize QueryDescriptor in handleQuery (default filters/projections,
  accept select alias)
- Share WASM module import across DOs via wasm-module.ts
- Switch wrangler.toml to [[rules]] type=CompiledWasm for ES modules
- Add scripts/seed-local-r2.ts and scripts/bench.ts for local benchmarking
- Fix Parquet SchemaElement Thrift field ID mapping

Benchmark results (wrangler dev, local R2):
  Parquet plain 5 rows:       ~1.3ms p50
  Parquet 100k uncompressed:  ~54ms p50
  Lance int64 5 rows:         ~2.2ms p50

files.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,9 @@
     "test": "vitest run",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
     "deploy": "wrangler deploy",
-    "wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm && cp zig-out/bin/querymode.wasm ../src/wasm/"
+    "wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm && cp zig-out/bin/querymode.wasm ../src/wasm/",
+    "bench:seed": "npx tsx scripts/seed-local-r2.ts",
+    "bench": "npx tsx scripts/bench.ts"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@cloudflare/workers-types": "^4.20250224.0",

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+/**
+ * WASM module import — used by DOs in Wrangler modules format.
+ * The `.wasm` import returns a compiled WebAssembly.Module.
+ */
+// @ts-expect-error — Wrangler handles .wasm imports as CompiledWasm modules
+import wasmModule from "./wasm/querymode.wasm";
+
+export default wasmModule as WebAssembly.Module;
